## PR Auto Describe ## Summary Bump `actions/checkout` from v6 to v7 across all three GitHub Actions workflows (CI, release, AI PR describer). This aligns with the latest stable version, providing improved performance, bug fixes, and Node.js 20 runtime support. ## Key Changes - **Workflows updated**: `ci.yml`, `release.yml`, `ai-pr-describer.yml` - All instances of `actions/checkout@v6` → `actions/checkout@v7` ## Detailed Breakdown - `ci.yml`: Updated checkout action in both the `ubuntu-latest` job and the macOS/Windows matrix job - `release.yml`: Updated checkout action in the build job - `ai-pr-describer.yml`: Updated checkout action with `fetch-depth: 0` preserved All other workflow steps (toolchain setup, artifact handling, releases, etc.) remain unchanged. ## Notes (Optional) v7 of `actions/checkout` uses Node.js 20 and includes performance improvements and bug fixes. No configuration changes required—drop-in replacement. ## Breaking Changes None. _Last updated: 2026-06-23 16:54:23_

author: Fajar Hidayat
message:
Refactor connection management, enhance CLI, and update tests (#96)

<!-- AI-PR-DESCRIPTION-START -->
## PR Auto Describe


## Summary

Major refactor introducing connection pooling (r2d2), structured logging
(tracing), and new CLI features (`omni goal`, `omni remember`), while
removing the self-optimization loop (`optimize`/`verify` commands).
Fuzzing infrastructure deleted, README and media completely rebranded.

---

## Key Changes

| Area | Change |
|------|--------|
| **DB Layer** | Replaced `store.conn.lock()` with `r2d2` connection
pool (`store.pool.get()?`) |
| **Observability** | Added `tracing` + `tracing-subscriber`;
instrumented `distill_with_command`, `process_payload` |
| **New CLI** | `omni goal` (North Star pinning), `omni remember`
(persistent memory), interactive init via `dialoguer` |
| **Removed** | `optimize.rs`, `verify.rs`, fuzz harness (`fuzz/`),
`hero.svg` |
| **Added** | `logo.svg` (headphone brand mark), `goal.rs`,
`remember.rs` |
| **README** | Complete rewrite: "noise-canceling headphones for AI
agents" messaging |
| **Cargo.toml** | +`r2d2`, `r2d2_sqlite`, `tracing`,
`tracing-subscriber`, `dialoguer`, `console`; updated
keywords/categories |

---

## Detailed Breakdown

### Database & Connection Pooling
- `doctor.rs`: `store.conn.lock().unwrap()` → `store.pool.get()?`  
- `Cargo.toml`/`Cargo.lock`: Added `r2d2 0.8.10`, `r2d2_sqlite 0.24.0`,
`uuid 1.23.3`, `rand 0.10.1`, `scheduled-thread-pool 0.2.7` (transitive)

### Observability
- Added `tracing = "0.1"`, `tracing-subscriber = "0.3"` with
`env-filter` feature
- Added `#[tracing::instrument(skip_all)]` to `distill_with_command` and
`process_payload`
- `main.rs` initializes tracing subscriber on startup
(`tracing_subscriber::fmt().try_init()`)

### New CLI Commands
- **`omni goal`** (`src/cli/goal.rs`): Stores project goal as
`__omni_goal__` in `project_knowledge`, auto-injected at session start
- **`omni remember`** (`src/cli/remember.rs`): User-memory CLI with
`--category` (decision/pattern/gotcha/fact), `--tags`,
`--project-scoped`

### Init Overhaul
- Interactive selection replaced numbered input with `dialoguer::Select`
- Added "OMNI Before & After" preview before installation
- Added `dialoguer::Confirm` for user confirmation

### Memory & Engrams
- `post_tool.rs`: Added implicit engram auto-capture on key events
(error resolution, tool success)
- `engram.rs`: Detects and persists engrams automatically after tool
execution

### Distillers
- `distill_find_output`: Restructured output format from `find: N
results, .ext: count, samples:` to `find: total=N files=N dirs=N` with
grouped ext/dir counts

### CLI Architecture
- `main.rs`: Replaced manual arg parsing with `clap::Parser` +
`Subcommand` enum
- Removed `--hook`, `--post-hook`, `--mcp` flags; replaced with
`#[arg(long, hide = true)]` on `OmniArgs`
- Removed `optimize` and `verify` commands entirely

### Learn Path Resolution
- `learn.rs` (apply mode): Checks `.omni/filters.toml` or `.omni.toml`
in current dir before falling back to `~/.omni/`

### Dependencies Added
- `chacha20 0.10.0`, `cpufeatures 0.3.0`, `matchers 0.2.0`,
`nu-ansi-term 0.50.3`, `sharded-slab 0.1.7`, `shell-words 1.1.1`,
`thread_local 1.1.9`, `valuable 0.1.1`, `tracing-log 0.2.0`

### Removed
- `fuzz/Cargo.toml`, `fuzz/fuzz_targets/collapse_fuzzer.rs`
- `media/hero.svg`
- `src/cli/optimize.rs`, `src/cli/verify.rs`

---

## Breaking Changes

| Item | Impact |
|------|--------|
| **`store.conn.lock()` removed** | Any code using direct connection
access needs migration to `store.pool.get()?` |
| **`omni optimize` removed** | Self-optimization loop no longer
available; users must use `omni learn` instead |
| **`omni verify` removed** | Maker-Checker verification CLI removed |
| **CLI flag parsing** | Internal mode detection changed; hooks still
work via `--hook`/`--post-hook` hidden args |

_Last updated: 2026-06-24 13:54:49_
<!-- AI-PR-DESCRIPTION-END -->

Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore major version` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency's major version (unless you unignore this specific dependency's major version or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore minor version` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency's minor version (unless you unignore this specific dependency's minor version or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore ` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency (unless you unignore this specific dependency or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot unignore ` will remove all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot unignore ` will remove the ignore condition of the specified dependency and ignore conditions You can disable automated security fix PRs for this repo from the [Security Alerts page](https://github.com/fajarhide/omni/network/alerts).
## PR Auto Describe ## Summary Updated `@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent` from `^0.79.0` to `^0.79.8` in the `plugins/pi` plugin. This is a minor version update that includes upstream bug fixes, dependency updates, and new telemetry support. --- ## Key Changes - **Upgraded**: `pi-coding-agent` and all its internal packages (`pi-agent-core`, `pi-ai`, `pi-tui`) from 0.79.0 → 0.79.8 - **New telemetry**: Added `@opentelemetry/api` and `@opentelemetry/semantic-conventions` for distributed tracing support in AI package - **Updated sub-dependencies**: `marked` (15→18), `undici` (8.3→8.5), `protobufjs` (7.5.9→7.6.4), `ws` (8.20.1→8.21.0), `@mistralai/mistralai` (2.2.1→2.2.6) - **New dependency**: `semver` 7.8.0 added to `pi-coding-agent` --- ## Detailed Breakdown | Package | Old | New | Notes | |---------|-----|-----|-------| | `@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent` | 0.79.0 | 0.79.8 | Main dependency upgrade | | `@earendil-works/pi-agent-core` | 0.79.0 | 0.79.8 | Transitive | | `@earendil-works/pi-ai` | 0.79.0 | 0.79.8 | +`@opentelemetry/api` optional dep | | `@earendil-works/pi-tui` | 0.79.0 | 0.79.8 | `marked` 15→18 | | `@mistralai/mistralai` | 2.2.1 | 2.2.6 | Added OpenTelemetry support | | `undici` | 8.3.0 | 8.5.0 | HTTP client | | `protobufjs` | 7.5.9 | 7.6.4 | Removed `@protobufjs/inquire` dep | | `ws` | 8.20.1 | 8.21.0 | WebSocket | | `semver` | — | 7.8.0 | New direct dep | | `@opentelemetry/api` | — | 1.9.0 | New telemetry API | | `@opentelemetry/semantic-conventions` | — | 1.41.1 | New telemetry conventions | --- ## Notes - `marked` v18 requires Node.js 20+ (was v15 requiring 18+). Verify Node version compatibility. - `@opentelemetry/api` is optional peer dep in `@mistralai/mistralai`; tracing can be disabled if not needed. --- ## Breaking Changes - **Node version**: `marked` 18.x requires Node.js ≥20 (previously ≥18). Ensure deployment environment uses Node 20+. _Last updated: 2026-06-20 16:10:48_

author: Fajar Hidayat
message:
chore(deps-dev): bump @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent from 0.75.3 to 0.79.0 in /plugins/pi in the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory (#97) Bumps the npm_and_yarn group with 1 update in the /plugins/pi directory: [@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent](https://github.com/earendil-works/pi/tree/HEAD/packages/coding-agent). Updates `@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent` from 0.75.3 to 0.79.0
Release notes

Sourced from @​earendil-works/pi-coding-agent's releases.

v0.79.0

New Features

  • Project trust for local inputs - Pi now asks before loading project-local settings, resources, instructions, and packages, with saved decisions and --approve / --no-approve controls for non-interactive modes. See Project Trust.
  • Extension-controlled trust decisions - Global and CLI extensions can handle project_trust, decide, remember, or defer project trust before project-local resources load. See project_trust.
  • Cache-hit visibility in the footer - The interactive footer now shows the latest prompt cache hit rate (CH). See Interactive Mode.
  • Richer SDK and RPC extension surfaces - Public exports now include RPC extension UI request/response types and package asset path helpers. See Extension UI Protocol and SDK Exports.

Added

  • Added a project_trust extension event so global and CLI extensions can decide or defer project trust during startup and runtime cwd switches.
  • Added project trust gating for project-local settings, resources, instructions, and packages (#5332).
  • Added the latest prompt cache hit rate to the interactive footer.
  • Exported RPC extension UI request and response types from the public API (#5455).
  • Exported coding-agent package asset path helpers from the public API (#5415).

Fixed

  • Fixed package exports by removing the stale ./hooks subpath that pointed at non-existent build output.
  • Fixed inherited TUI rendering to clear stale lines when content shrinks to zero.
  • Fixed inherited autocomplete suggestions to refresh after editor cursor movement (#5499 by @​Roman-Galeev).
  • Fixed /reload to persist project trust when an implicitly trusted session creates a project .pi directory.
  • Fixed project trust input discovery to traverse parent directories portably.
  • Fixed inherited intermittent Shift+Enter handling by making Kitty keyboard protocol fallback response-driven instead of timeout-driven (#5188).
  • Fixed the compaction summarization system prompt to use neutral AI assistant wording for non-coding agents (#5401).
  • Fixed models.json schema support and inherited OpenAI Responses custom-provider handling for compat.supportsDeveloperRole: false (#5456).
  • Fixed inherited prompt history navigation to place the cursor at the start when browsing upward and at the end when browsing downward (#5454).
  • Fixed tmux setup documentation to require tmux 3.5 for extended-keys-format csi-u and document the tmux 3.2-3.4 fallback (#5432).
  • Fixed inherited OpenRouter routing preferences on OpenAI-compatible custom providers to work when the custom provider base URL does not point directly at OpenRouter (#5347).
  • Fixed built-in tool expand hints to style closing parentheses consistently (#5359).
  • Fixed skill-wrapped prompts to insert spacing between skill instructions and the user message (#5371 by @​Perlence).

v0.78.1

New Features

  • More built-in provider coverage - Added Ant Ling and NVIDIA NIM provider setup, plus MiniMax-M3 support for the direct MiniMax providers. See Providers.
  • Richer extension context - Extensions can use ctx.mode and ctx.getSystemPromptOptions() to adapt behavior across TUI, RPC, JSON, and print modes and inspect base system prompt inputs. See Extensions.

Added

  • Added containerization documentation and a Gondolin extension example for routing built-in tools into a local micro-VM.
  • Added Ant Ling provider selection and setup documentation.
  • Added MiniMax-M3 model support inherited from @earendil-works/pi-ai for the minimax and minimax-cn direct providers (#5313).
  • Added NVIDIA NIM provider selection, setup documentation, and direct NIM request attribution headers.
  • Added ctx.mode to extension contexts so extensions can distinguish TUI, RPC, JSON, and print mode.
  • Added ctx.getSystemPromptOptions() for extension commands to inspect the current base system prompt inputs (#5306 by @​xl0).

Fixed

... (truncated)

Changelog

Sourced from @​earendil-works/pi-coding-agent's changelog.

[0.79.0] - 2026-06-08

New Features

  • Project trust for local inputs - Pi now asks before loading project-local settings, resources, instructions, and packages, with saved decisions and --approve / --no-approve controls for non-interactive modes. See Project Trust.
  • Extension-controlled trust decisions - Global and CLI extensions can handle project_trust, decide, remember, or defer project trust before project-local resources load. See project_trust.
  • Cache-hit visibility in the footer - The interactive footer now shows the latest prompt cache hit rate (CH). See Interactive Mode.
  • Richer SDK and RPC extension surfaces - Public exports now include RPC extension UI request/response types and package asset path helpers. See Extension UI Protocol and SDK Exports.

Added

  • Added a project_trust extension event so global and CLI extensions can decide or defer project trust during startup and runtime cwd switches.
  • Added project trust gating for project-local settings, resources, instructions, and packages (#5332).
  • Added the latest prompt cache hit rate to the interactive footer.
  • Exported RPC extension UI request and response types from the public API (#5455).
  • Exported coding-agent package asset path helpers from the public API (#5415).

Fixed

  • Fixed package exports by removing the stale ./hooks subpath that pointed at non-existent build output.
  • Fixed inherited TUI rendering to clear stale lines when content shrinks to zero.
  • Fixed inherited autocomplete suggestions to refresh after editor cursor movement (#5499 by @​Roman-Galeev).
  • Fixed /reload to persist project trust when an implicitly trusted session creates a project .pi directory.
  • Fixed project trust input discovery to traverse parent directories portably.
  • Fixed inherited intermittent Shift+Enter handling by making Kitty keyboard protocol fallback response-driven instead of timeout-driven (#5188).
  • Fixed the compaction summarization system prompt to use neutral AI assistant wording for non-coding agents (#5401).
  • Fixed models.json schema support and inherited OpenAI Responses custom-provider handling for compat.supportsDeveloperRole: false (#5456).
  • Fixed inherited prompt history navigation to place the cursor at the start when browsing upward and at the end when browsing downward (#5454).
  • Fixed tmux setup documentation to require tmux 3.5 for extended-keys-format csi-u and document the tmux 3.2-3.4 fallback (#5432).
  • Fixed inherited OpenRouter routing preferences on OpenAI-compatible custom providers to work when the custom provider base URL does not point directly at OpenRouter (#5347).
  • Fixed built-in tool expand hints to style closing parentheses consistently (#5359).
  • Fixed skill-wrapped prompts to insert spacing between skill instructions and the user message (#5371 by @​Perlence).

[0.78.1] - 2026-06-04

New Features

  • More built-in provider coverage - Added Ant Ling and NVIDIA NIM provider setup, plus MiniMax-M3 support for the direct MiniMax providers. See Providers.
  • Richer extension context - Extensions can use ctx.mode and ctx.getSystemPromptOptions() to adapt behavior across TUI, RPC, JSON, and print modes and inspect base system prompt inputs. See Extensions.

Added

  • Added containerization documentation and a Gondolin extension example for routing built-in tools into a local micro-VM.
  • Added Ant Ling provider selection and setup documentation.
  • Added MiniMax-M3 model support inherited from @earendil-works/pi-ai for the minimax and minimax-cn direct providers (#5313).
  • Added NVIDIA NIM provider selection, setup documentation, and direct NIM request attribution headers.
  • Added ctx.mode to extension contexts so extensions can distinguish TUI, RPC, JSON, and print mode.
  • Added ctx.getSystemPromptOptions() for extension commands to inspect the current base system prompt inputs (#5306 by @​xl0).

Fixed

  • d8aef0f feat(coding-agent): allow project trust extensions to defer
  • 085a085 fix(coding-agent): remove stale hooks export
  • 718215b feat(coding-agent): add extension project trust decisions
  • 38f18be fix(coding-agent): persist implicit project trust on reload
  • 130ae57 fix(tui,coding-agent): make keyboard protocol fallback response-driven
  • 72fd911 fix(coding-agent): neutralize compaction summarization prompt
